The name is not unusual, but it is not possible to verify the specific individual without additional context. The convention 'et al.' is appropriate for citing papers with multiple authors.
title: The title 'Cold chain logistics: a possible mode of SARS-CoV-2 transmission?' is highly plausible. Cold chain logistics were investigated as a potential transmission route for SARS-CoV-2, particularly in the context of imported frozen food contamination leading to COVID-19 outbreaks in China during 2020-2021. Multiple research papers were published on this topic during the pandemic. The phrasing of the title is consistent with academic inquiry and is appropriate for a BMJ article.
